document.title: M1 Lattice: Recommended Link Types
document.purpose: Provides a shared set of commonly useful link types to promote consistency across M1 systems.

description: This document defines a set of commonly used link type entities. These are recommendations, not requirements.

linktypes.title: Parent → Child
linktypes.description: Indicates a hierarchical containment or derivation relationship.

linktypes.title: Points To
linktypes.description: Indicates a directional reference or pointer.

linktypes.title: Member Of
linktypes.description: Indicates membership in a group or collection.

linktypes.title: Resource For
linktypes.description: Indicates entity is a resource for another entity.
